pr.title: docs: add Tuning Engines OpenAI-compatible example
pr.body:
## Summary

- adds a Tuning Engines example to the OpenAI-compatible API docs
- shows the required `OPENAI_API_BASE`, `OPENAI_API_KEY`, and `openai/<model-alias>` usage
- keeps the change docs-only and uses aider's existing OpenAI-compatible provider path

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
pr.author: cerebrixos
